empty.reason: The gallery renders the fixed 22-arcana deck from a static import; it is never empty.

single.reason: The deck is always the full 22 cards; a single-item state cannot occur.

many.reason: The deck count is fixed at 22; there is no variable or larger set to demonstrate overflow beyond the typical view, which already scrolls.

loading.reason: CAROT_CARDS is a static import; the view fetches nothing, so there is no loading state.

edge.reason: Card content is fixed and curated; no variable-length or user-supplied fields render here.

error.reason: No data fetching or failure path exists on this read-only view.

key-interaction.reason: The only action is tapping a card, which navigates to that card's /reading route — a navigation, not an in-place state; the reading scenarios cover the destination.
